channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: Milos Uzan soared for an uncontested layup on a beautifully executed inbound play with 0.9 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston survived a late collapse to beat fourth-seeded Purdue 62-60 in the Sweet 16 of the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lilia Vu has another bogey-free day and leads a pack of LPGA stars in Arizona
item.description: CHANDLER, Ariz. (AP) — Lilia Vu didn't feel her best on the range. She made up for that on the golf course Friday with an 8-under 64, giving her a two-shot lead over a group that includes Nelly Korda and Jeeno Thitikul in a Ford Championship packed with LPGA stars. Korda and Thitikul, the Nos.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for Mets in win against Astros
item.description: Juan Soto hit his first home run with the New York Mets when he connected in the third inning against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley responds to tongue-lashing by coach and leads South Carolina into the Elite Eight
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley has seen a lot of growth in South Carolina star guard MiLaysia Fulwiley over the last few months. The Gamecocks coach wasn't happy with the way the sophomore was playing on either end of the court on Friday, so she lit into her in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gianna Kneepkens enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Gianna Kneepkens, the leading scorer on the Utah women's basketball team has announced she is entering the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alysa Liu delivers the US its first women's figure skating world championship in nearly 2 decades
item.description: Alysa Liu became the first American women's figure skating world champion in nearly two decades Friday night, dethroning three-time defending champion Kaori Sakamoto with a brilliant free skate that earned her a standing ovation inside TD Garden.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Spanish court overturns soccer player Dani Alves' rape conviction on appeal
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Brazilian soccer player Dani Alves won his appeal against a sexual assault conviction as a Spanish court overturned the ruling Friday in a case that lasted more than three years and saw the former Barcelona defender spend 14 months in jail.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine school officials refuse to comply with Trump's ultimatum to ban transgender athletes from girls sports
item.description: The Trump administration gave Maine an ultimatum to ban transgender athletes from girls sports by Thursday, and state school officials appear to have defied it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: USC star JuJu Watkins suffers season-ending knee injury in March Madness win over Mississippi State
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins was carried off the floor with a season-ending knee injury in the first quarter of top-seeded Southern California’s game against Mississippi State in the NCAA Tournament on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks win Big 12 Championship
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 regular season and Championship titles during its debut season in the Conference after the Red Rocks tallied a score of 197.775 at the 2025 Big 12 Gymnastics Championship held at the Maverik Center in West Valley City, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Toropchenko, Hofer lead Blues past Blackhawks 4-1, extend winning streak to 5 games
item.description: Alexey Toropchenko had a goal and an assist and goalie Joel Hofer made 26 saves, leading the St. Louis Blues to a 4-1 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: March Madness: No. 2 UConn routs Arkansas State 103-34 in opener as Fudd has 27 points
item.description: After the Red Wolves’ Crislyn Rose scored the game’s first basket in the NCAA Tournament first-round game, UConn ripped off the next 22 points en route to a convincing 103-34 victory on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: McNeese's Will Wade signs a 6-year deal to become NC State coach, AP source says
item.description: McNeese coach Will Wade has a signed six-year deal to take over as N.C. State's next coach, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC are headed to the Lone Star State to take on Austin FC
item.description: San Diego FC are gearing up for Matchday 5 of the MLS season, which will see them head to the Texas capital to take on Austin FC at 1:00 p.m. on Sunday March 23rd.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
